title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 537.050 - Civil action not merged in criminal prosecution
text:
537.050.  Civil action not merged in criminal prosecution. — In no case shall the right of action of any party injured by the commission of any felony or misdemeanor be deemed or adjudged to be merged in such felony or misdemeanor; but he may recover the amount of damages sustained thereby in an action to be brought before any court or tribunal of competent jurisdiction.
(RSMo 1939 § 3679) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3289; 1919 § 4240; 1909 § 5447
